sections.paragraph: pers. pron. 2 pers. pl. f. you, ye. Once found Eze 34:31, where other copies have אַתֵּן. With ה parag. it is written אַתֵּנָה Gen 31:6 Eze 13:11, 20 Eze 13:20 34:17 and ibid. 13:20, אַתֵּנָּה, according to the analogy of the forms הֵמָּה, הֵנָּה. Nun at the end, like Mem, is a mark of multitude, especially in the fem.; comp. ־ִין, ־ָן, תִּקְטֹלְנָה.
